data.title: Moderna Struggles With Declining Q4 COVID Vaccine Sales, Stock Slides
data.description: Moderna reported a Q4 EPS loss of $2.91, missing estimates, with revenue down 66% YoY to $966 million. The company reaffirmed 2025 guidance and cost-cutting plans.

data.title: International Paper To Close Multiple Plants, Slash Jobs
data.description: International Paper (NYSE: IP) will close several facilities, including the Red River mill in Louisiana and plants in Phoenix, Hazleton, and St. Louis. The closures will impact 674 employees.

data.title: Apple Focuses On Alibaba, Baidu Partnership In Race To Bring AI Features To China by Mid-2025
data.description: U.S.-listed Chinese stocks gain with DeepSeek & Alibaba's affordable AI models, Apple confirms use of Alibaba's AI in China, China mandates collaboration with local companies, Apple partners with Baidu & explores other AI models, Counterpoint expects AI-capable phones to dominate market by 2028, Apple's China revenues decline but expected to regain with launch of Apple Intelligence, China is key market for smartphones, computing, and AI.
